creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this in your Philippines Travel bucket list!

Ilaya Highland Resort is a hideaway tucked in a forest in Patag, Silay City. It has a stunning infinity pool, a restaurant serving delicious Filipino and international cuisines, huts for day trippers, and glamping tents for overnight guests. 

🚗 Less than an hour drive from Bacolod-Silay Airport. 
🎟️ Day Trip entrance fee: 200 PHP
💦 Pool use: 100 PHP
🛖 Hut for 6 persons: 500 PHP
🍲 Most dishes are from 300 PHP onwards
🏕️ Glamping rate starts at 4,800 PHP

Prices as of March 2023. Please contact @ilayahighlandresort for current rates and reservations.
